task: place the butter dairy in the sink
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plastic container (sink) is on the right. A yellow rectangular object (butter dairy) is on the wooden table near the sink. The butter dairy is rigid and has a flat top. STRATEGY - Reach the butter dairy, grasp it, transport it to the sink, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the butter dairy during transport or misplacing it outside the sink. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the butter dairy body; Step 2 grasp its top for secure hold; Step 3 transport above the sink; Step 4 lower into the sink interior.
Goal: inside(butter_dairy, sink)
Scene: butter_dairy, sink, table
Step 1: reach(butter_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow butter dairy
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, butter_dairy, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, butter_dairy) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(butter_dairy)
  affordance_region: the top flat surface of the yellow butter dairy
  contact: holding(butter_dairy) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(butter_dairy)
Step 3: transport(butter_dairy -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue sink
  spatial: above(butter_dairy, sink, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(butter_dairy)
  done_when: above(butter_dairy, sink, 0.05)
Step 4: place(butter_dairy -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue sink
  contact: surface_contact(butter_dairy, sink) [completion]; released(butter_dairy) [completion]
  pose: inside(butter_dairy, sink) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(butter_dairy, sink) AND released(butter_dairy)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow butter dairy
the top flat surface of the yellow butter dairy
an empty area inside the blue sink
an empty area inside the blue sink
